name: Chen
description: You can learn faith at the end of a sword.

25.left: Hand of God Full Health Restore for Chen and all of his Summons

abilities.name: Zealot
abilities.description: Whenever Chen respawns, he is joined by a Zealot, a melee warrior creep with the ability to sacrifice itself to heal or deal damage to an enemy. The Zealot respawns next to Chen after 60s. Zealot may be activated to teleport a unit under your control to Chen after a 6 second delay. If Chen is targeted, it will teleport all units you control. Taking damage from enemy heroes or their units will cancel the teleport. Respawn Time: 60. Bonus Base Damage per Level: 2. Cooldown: 10. Mana Cost: 50.

abilities.name: Penitence
abilities.description: Deals damage and applies a movement speed slow on the debuff-affected enemy unit. Grants all allied units bonus attack speed while attacking the debuff-affected enemy unit. Cast Range: 800. Damage: 50/75/100/125 (125/150/175/200). Move Speed Slow: 12%/18%/24%/30% (27%/33%/39%/45%). Debuff Duration: 5/6/7/8. Attack Speed Bonus: 20/40/60/80. Cooldown: 20/17/14/11. Mana Cost: 80/90/100/110.

abilities.name: Holy Persuasion
abilities.description: Persuades an enemy or neutral creep, excluding ancient creeps, for Chen's purposes. Grants Chen a portion of the gold bounty of the persuaded unit. Sets the persuaded creep's max health while fully restoring its health and mana. Grants the persuaded creeps various bonuses as well upon joining Chen's fleet. Cast Range: 600. Creep Gold Bounty Factor: 0.25/0.5/0.75/1. Set Creep Max Health: 400 (1700). Health Bonus per Hero Level: 50. Set Creep Current Health/Mana: 100%. Move Speed Bonus: 5/10/20/30. Cooldown: 15. Mana Cost: 110/130/150/170.

abilities.name: Divine Favor
abilities.description: Grants the affected allied hero bonus armor and an incoming heal amplification buff. Aura Radius: 1200. Health Regen Bonus: 1.5/3/4.5/6. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Cast Range: 1200. Armor Bonus: 5/10/15/20. Heal Amp: 5%/10%/15%/20% (0.2/0.25/0.3/0.35). Cooldown: 20/18/16/14. Mana Cost: 75.

abilities.name: Hand of God
abilities.description: Heals all allied heroes and his player-controlled units globally. Using the mental link with his thralls, Chen calls down restoration and well-being to those who share his fanaticism. Heal per Second: 20/30/40. Heal Duration: 10. Max Channel Time: (6). Mana Cost: 200/300/400.
